textPlain: This might seem a bit silly, but this is probably the first easily accessible and open iOS backup format extraction tool I've seen in many years. Maybe I've missed the good ones, or the hidden ones. But I find it quite fun that I can backup my device and run its output through this exploit analyzer to (a) determine if I have something to worry about and (b) stop fiddling with 3rd party hackaround software for file backup viewing. Cheers to the authors and the team that put this together, helping keep a rather closed OS at least somewhat safer, and sharing the tools to do so.
The background on that page is so distracting…
Was going to say the same thing. While neat it made it nearly impossible for me to focus on the content.
